data.title: MemeCore's event "HALLOMEME" in Seoul was successful at Korean Blockchain Week 2025.
data.description: Seoul, South Korea, Sept. 26, 2025 - MemeCore, the pioneering Layer 1 blockchain tailored for Meme 2.0, wrapped up its Korean Blockchain Week (KBW) 2025 side event, "HALLOMEME: Ride Until Next Morning," on September 23 at Lotte World Adventure in Seoul. The successful event attracted a significant audience, indicating substantial engagement within the blockchain and meme community.

data.title: DEA & NPCC boost crypto probes using Chainalysis Rapid, enhancing efficiency and empowering non-specialists.
data.description: Chainalysis has announced a collaboration between the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) and the National Police Chiefs' Council (NPCC) to enhance crypto investigations. Through the utilization of Chainalysis Rapid, the partnership aims to simplify the investigative process, making it accessible to individuals without specialized training. This initiative is projected to significantly enhance case efficiency and effectiveness in handling crypto-related matters.

data.title: Italian Wine Podcast releases Top 100 Wine Podcast Directory celebrating influential voices in global wine conversation.
data.description: In Verona, Italy on September 26, 2025, the Italian Wine Podcast team unveiled their inaugural global Wine Podcast Directory. This directory features 100 podcasts highlighting the leading figures influencing contemporary discussions in the world of wine. The aim of this innovative project is to provide a comprehensive guide to wine enthusiasts, offering a diverse range of perspectives and insights from key players in the industry.

data.title: MATIC trading at $0.38 faces bearish signals; Polygon's RSI at 38 hints at oversold bounce, with resistance at $0.58.
data.description: The price of MATIC remains steady at $0.38 despite negative technical indicators. The RSI for Polygon stands at 38, indicating a chance for a rebound due to potential overselling. However, a significant obstacle is seen at $0.58, posing as a key resistance level for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Despite whale accumulation of 158M DOGE in September, DOGE price falls to $0.23 (-3.25% daily) as technical analysis offers mixed signals.
data.description: With Dogecoin currently trading at 23 cents, experiencing a daily decrease of 3.25%, whales have acquired a significant 158 million DOGE in September. However, traders are advised to exercise caution due to bearish momentum indicators.
